resources.string: Please enable the following permissions to optimize your device performance and battery life:
Required to scan and optimize files on your device. This helps identify and fix storage issues.
Required to optimize network settings based on your location. Improves connection speed and reduces battery usage.
Required to show optimization progress and real-time performance statistics while you use other apps.
Required to run optimization tasks in the background. This ensures continuous performance monitoring and battery savings.

Required on some devices to ensure optimization continues after device restart. Helps maintain optimal performance at all times. When redirected to settings, look for \"Auto-start\", \"Autostart\", or \"Self-starting apps\" options and enable for this app.

To enable Auto-Start:

• Xiaomi/Redmi: Find "Autostart" in Security app
• Samsung: Find "Auto start" in Battery settings
• Oppo: Find "Startup Manager" in Security Center
• Vivo: Find "Auto-start" in iManager
• Huawei: Find "Protected apps" in Battery settings

Enable auto-start for System Optimizer, then return to this app.
Please enable all permissions to start the optimization process. These permissions are necessary for the app to function properly.
All permissions granted! You can now start optimization.
